project(NitroMLKitDocumentScanner)
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.9.0)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

add_library(NitroMLKitDocumentScanner SHARED
  src/main/cpp/cpp-adapter.cpp
)

# Add all files generated by Nitrogen
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../nitrogen/generated/android/NitroMLKitDocumentScanner+autolinking.cmake)
